{{Quote|The birds. I used to feed them in the training ground back on Coruscant. Song sparrows. Crown finches. You should have seen them flitting around the Great Tree, so many colors, darting this way and that.|Ky Narec's voice to Asajj Ventress|audio=GreatTreebirds.flac|<ref name="Dooku: Jedi Lost" />}}
A '''song sparrow''' was a type of [[color]]ful [[sparrow]] endemic to the [[planet]] [[Coruscant]]. [[Ky Narec]], a [[Jedi Knight]], enjoyed [[Diet|feeding]] and watching song sparrows and [[crown finch]]es fly around the [[Great Tree (Coruscant)|Great Tree]], located in the [[Jedi Temple training ground]] in the [[Imperial Palace|Jedi Temple]] on Coruscant.<ref name="Dooku: Jedi Lost" /> Around [[23 BBY]],<ref name="Dooku Assassin Date">{{DookuJediLostDate}}</ref> Narec's voice told [[Sith apprentice]] [[Asajj Ventress]] that when he was off-world, he missed feeding the birds that lived in the Jedi Temple. Song sparrows were regularly seen to flutter around the Temple's Great Tree.<ref name="Dooku: Jedi Lost" />

==Behind the scenes==
Song sparrows were first mentioned in the current ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] by the audio drama ''[[Dooku: Jedi Lost]]'', written by [[Cavan Scott]]<ref name="Dooku: Jedi Lost" /> and published on [[April 30]], [[2019]].<ref name="Penguin-Download">{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/607498/dooku-jedi-lost-star-wars-by-cavan-scott/9780593102817|text=Dooku: Jedi Lost (Star Wars)}}</ref> The spelling of song sparrows was confirmed by the audio drama's [[Dooku: Jedi Lost (script)|script release]]<ref name="Dooku: Jedi Lost script">[[Dooku: Jedi Lost (script)|''Dooku: Jedi Lost'' script]]</ref> on [[October 1]] of the same year.<ref name="Penguin-Download" />
In the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, [[Song sparrow/Legends|song sparrows]] were first mentioned in the short story "[[Tinian on Trial]]," written by [[Kathy Tyers]] and published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 4]] by [[West End Games]] in [[November]] [[1994]].<ref name="Tinian on Trial">{{JournalCite|4|Tinian on Trial}}</ref>
